hp : p ≤ Erdos392.Params.L P

    -↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * Real.log ↑(Erdos392.Params.n P) -
      ↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * ↑(Erdos392.Params.L P) ^ 2 * ↑(primeCounting (Erdos392.Params.n P))

          · simp [hn]

            have hL_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.L := Nat.cast_nonneg _
            have hpi_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ primeCounting P.n := Nat.cast_nonneg _

            nlinarith [h1, Nat.cast_nonneg (P.n.factorial.factorization p)]
      _ ≤ _ := by linarith [h_sum_nonneg]
  linarith

simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, ge_iff_le, neg_sub_left, sub_neg_eq_add,
    neg_add_le_iff_le_add, ← sub_le_iff_le_add]
  have hsum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := Multiset.sum_nonneg fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _
  have hfact_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n := by
    by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
    · exact_mod_cast Nat.factorization_lt (factorial_pos P.n).ne' hp_prime
    · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]
  have hn_bound : (P.n : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · have hM_pos : 0 < P.M := by
        by_contra hM
        push_neg at hM
        interval_cases P.M <;> simp_all [Params.hL]
      have : P.M * P.L^2 ≥ P.n := by nlinarith [P.hL]
      have hpi : primeCounting P.n ≥ 1 := by
        have : 2 ≤ P.n := by nlinarith [P.hL, P.hL_pos]
        exact Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr (Nat.primeCounting_pos this).ne'
      have hlog : Real.log P.n ≥ 0 := Real.log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn)
      calc (P.n : ℝ) ≤ P.M * P.L^2 := by exact_mod_cast this
        _ ≤ P.M * P.L^2 * 1 := by ring_nf
        _ ≤ P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by nlinarith
        _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by linarith
  linarith [hsum_nonneg, hfact_bound, hn_bound]

simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, ge_iff_le, neg_add_rev, neg_neg]
  have h1 : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ 
      (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum + P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn, Params.initial]
    · have hn_pos : 0 < P.n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn
      -- The factorial valuation is bounded by n/(p-1) ≤ n
      have hfact_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n := by
        by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
        · have := Nat.Prime.factorization_factorial_le_div_pred hp_prime hn_pos
          calc (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n / (p - 1) := by exact_mod_cast this
            _ ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast Nat.div_le_self P.n (p - 1)
        · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]
      have hsum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := 
        Multiset.sum_nonneg fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _
      have hM_log_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
        by_cases hlog : Real.log P.n ≥ 0
        · exact mul_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg _) hlog
        · push_neg at hlog
          have : P.n = 0 ∨ P.n = 1 := by
            rcases P.n with _ | _ | n <;> simp_all [Real.log_one, Real.log_neg_iff]
            exact (hlog (Real.log_pos (by linarith : (1 : ℝ) < n + 2))).elim
          cases this <;> simp_all
      have hML_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by positivity
      calc (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n := hfact_bound
        _ ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum + P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
            have hcard := Params.initial.card P
            push_cast
            linarith [hsum_nonneg, hM_log_nonneg, hML_nonneg, hcard]
  linarith

have h_sum_nonneg : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≥ 0 := by positivity

    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by positivity
    linarith

    simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
    have hsum : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := Multiset.sum_nonneg fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _
    linarith
  calc (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) 
      ≥ -(P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) := h2
    _ ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n - P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
        have hfact : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
          by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
          · have hlog : P.n.factorial.factorization p ≤ P.n := Nat.factorization_factorial_le hp_prime P.n
            calc (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast hlog
              _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
                  have hn_pos : 0 < P.n := by have := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le; omega
                  have : Real.log P.n ≥ 0 := Real.log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast Nat.one_le_of_lt hn_pos)
                  have : (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by positivity
                  nlinarith [P.hL_pos, P.hL]
          · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]; positivity
        linarith

have h1 : (0 : ℤ) ≤ P.initial.sum fun m ↦ m.factorization p := by
    simp only [Factorization.sum, Params.initial]
    exact Multiset.sum_nonneg fun x hx ↦ by
      simp only [Multiset.mem_map] at hx; obtain ⟨_, _, rfl⟩ := hx; exact Nat.zero_le _
  have h2 : -(P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≥ 
      -↑P.M * Real.log ↑P.n - ↑P.M * ↑P.L ^ 2 * ↑(primeCounting P.n) := by
    simp only [neg_ge_neg_iff, ge_iff_le]
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · have : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
        have hfact_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
          exact_mod_cast Nat.factorization_lt (Nat.factorial_pos P.n).ne' p |>.le
        calc (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := hfact_bound
          _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by nlinarith [P.hL_pos, P.hL]
      exact_mod_cast this.trans (by ring_nf; positivity)
  calc P.initial.balance p = P.initial.sum (fun m ↦ m.factorization p) - P.n.factorial.factorization p := rfl
    _ ≥ 0 - P.n.factorial.factorization p := by linarith
    _ = -(P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) := by ring
    _ ≥ -↑P.M * Real.log ↑P.n - ↑P.M * ↑P.L ^ 2 * ↑(primeCounting P.n) := h2

simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
  have hsum_nonneg : (0 : ℤ) ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum :=
    Multiset.sum_nonneg fun x hx => by simp_all [Multiset.mem_map]; omega
  have hfact_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
      · have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := Nat.cast_pos.mpr hp_prime.pos
        have hlog_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n / (p - 1) := by
          have := Nat.Prime.factorization_factorial_le_div_pred hp_prime P.n
          exact_mod_cast this
        have hdiv_bound : (P.n : ℝ) / (p - 1) ≤ P.n := by
          rcases p with _ | _ | p
          · exact (hp_prime.ne_zero rfl).elim
          · exact (hp_prime.ne_one rfl).elim
          · simp only [Nat.cast_succ, add_sub_cancel_right, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
            exact div_le_self (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (by linarith : (1 : ℝ) ≤ p + 1)
        calc (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ)
          _ ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast hlog_bound.trans hdiv_bound
          _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
              have hM : P.M ≥ 0 := Nat.zero_le _
              have hL : P.L^2 ≥ 0 := Nat.zero_le _
              have hpi : primeCounting P.n ≥ 0 := Nat.zero_le _
              by_cases hM0 : P.M = 0
              · have : P.n > P.L * P.L := P.hL
                have hL_pos : P.L > 0 := P.hL_pos
                have : P.n > 0 := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos hL_pos hL_pos) this.le
                simp [hM0] at this ⊢
                linarith [Nat.cast_pos.mpr this]
              · have hM_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.M := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hM0)
                have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
                  have : P.n > P.L * P.L := P.hL; exact_mod_cast Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) this.le
                have hlog_pos : Real.log P.n ≥ 0 := Real.log_nonneg (by linarith : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n)
                nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg P.n, Nat.cast_nonneg (primeCounting P.n)]
      · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]
        have hM : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.M := Nat.cast_nonneg _
        have hL : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.L^2 := by positivity
        have hpi : (0 : ℝ) ≤ primeCounting P.n := Nat.cast_nonneg _
        nlinarith
  linarith

  have h_fact_bound : ((P.n.factorial).factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by

    · simp [hn]
    · by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
      · have h_legendre : (P.n.factorial).factorization p ≤ P.n := by
          calc (P.n.factorial).factorization p
            _ ≤ P.n / (p - 1) := Prime.factorization_factorial_le_div_pred hp_prime P.n
            _ ≤ P.n / 1 := Nat.div_le_div_left (by omega) (by omega)
            _ = P.n := Nat.div_one P.n
        calc ((P.n.factorial).factorization p : ℤ)
          _ ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast h_legendre
          _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
              have hM : P.M ≥ 1 ∨ P.M = 0 := by omega
              rcases hM with hM | hM
              · have hn_pos : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
                  have := P.hL; have := P.hL_pos; omega
                have h1 : (P.n : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
                  have : Real.log P.n ≥ 0 := Real.log_nonneg hn_pos
                  have : (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by positivity
                  nlinarith [P.hL, P.hL_pos, Real.add_one_le_exp (Real.log P.n)]
                exact_mod_cast h1
              · simp [hM] at *; omega
      · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]; positivity
  linarith

simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, ge_iff_le, neg_add_rev, neg_neg]
  by_cases hn : P.n = 0
  · simp only [hn, Params.initial, Nat.zero_div, smoothNumbers_zero, Multiset.mem_filter,
      Finset.not_mem_empty, and_false, not_false_eq_true, Multiset.filter_true_of_mem,
      tsub_zero, Nat.zero_sub, Multiset.Ico_eq_zero_of_le (le_refl 0), Multiset.replicate_zero,
      Multiset.join_zero, Multiset.map_zero, Multiset.sum_zero, Nat.cast_zero,
      factorial_zero, Nat.factorization_one, Finsupp.coe_zero, Pi.zero_apply, sub_zero]
    positivity
  · have hn_pos : 0 < P.n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn
    have : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n + (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := by
      have hfact_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n / (p - 1) := by
        by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
        · have hp_ge_2 : p ≥ 2 := hp_prime.two_le
          have : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n / (p - 1) := by
            have := Nat.factorization_factorial_le_div_pred hp_prime hn_pos
            exact_mod_cast this
          exact this
        · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]
      have hsum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := Multiset.sum_nonneg (fun x hx => by simp_all [Multiset.mem_map])
      nlinarith [hfact_bound, hsum_nonneg, P.hL_pos, hn_pos, Nat.cast_pos.mpr hn_pos, Real.log_pos (by linarith : (1 : ℝ) < P.n)]
    linarith

simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Params.initial]
  have h1 : (0 : ℤ) ≤ (map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)
      (filter (fun m ↦ m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)
      (replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).join)).sum := by
    apply Multiset.sum_nonneg
    intro x hx
    simp only [Multiset.mem_map] at hx
    obtain ⟨_, _, rfl⟩ := hx
    exact Nat.cast_nonneg _
  have h2 : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
      · have hlog : P.n.factorial.factorization p ≤ P.n := by
          calc P.n.factorial.factorization p
            _ ≤ P.n.log p := Nat.factorization_factorial_le_self hp_prime.pos P.n
            _ ≤ P.n := Nat.log_le_self p P.n
        calc (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ)
          _ ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast hlog
          _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
              have hM : 0 < P.M ∨ P.M = 0 := Nat.pos_or_eq_zero P.M
              rcases hM with hM | hM
              · have hn_pos : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
                  have := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
                  exact_mod_cast this
                have hlog_pos : 0 ≤ Real.log P.n := Real.log_nonneg hn_pos
                have hpi_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ primeCounting P.n := Nat.cast_nonneg _
                nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg P.M, Nat.cast_nonneg P.L, P.hL]
              · simp only [hM, Nat.cast_zero, zero_mul, zero_add, ge_iff_le]
                nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg P.L, Nat.cast_nonneg (primeCounting P.n)]
      · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]
  linarith

simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
  have h_sum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p) P.initial.a).sum :=
    Multiset.sum_nonneg fun _ _ ↦ Nat.zero_le _
  have h_fact_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
    · have h_legendre : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n / (p - 1) := by
        exact_mod_cast Nat.factorization_factorial_le_self hp_prime
      have hp_ge_2 : (2 : ℝ) ≤ p := by exact_mod_cast hp_prime.two_le
      have h_div : (P.n : ℝ) / (p - 1) ≤ P.n := by
        rw [div_le_iff (by linarith : (0 : ℝ) < p - 1)]
        nlinarith
      calc (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ)
        _ ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast h_legendre.trans h_div
        _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
            by_cases hn : P.n = 0
            · simp [hn]
            · have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
              have h1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n ∨ P.n = 1 := by
                rcases Nat.lt_or_ge P.n 3 with h | h
                · interval_cases P.n <;> simp_all
                · left; exact Real.one_le_log_of_pos (by linarith) (by linarith)
              nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg P.M, Nat.cast_nonneg P.L, Nat.cast_nonneg (primeCounting P.n)]
    · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]
  linarith

have h_sum_nonneg : (0 : ℤ) ≤ P.initial.sum (fun m ↦ m.factorization p) := by
    unfold Factorization.sum
    exact Multiset.sum_nonneg fun x hx ↦ by simp_all [Multiset.mem_map]; exact Nat.cast_nonneg _
  have h_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    have h1 : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := Nat.cast_le.mpr (factorization_factorial_le P.n p)
    have h2 : (P.n : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
      by_cases hn : P.n = 0
      · simp [hn]
      · have hM_pos : 0 < P.M := by
          by_contra h; push_neg at h; interval_cases P.M <;> simp_all [Params.hL]
        have := P.hL
        nlinarith [Real.log_pos (by linarith : (1 : ℝ) < P.n), Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn]
    linarith
  simp only [Factorization.balance]
  have := @Int.sub_nonneg_of_le (P.initial.sum fun m ↦ ↑(m.factorization p)) 0 h_sum_nonneg
  linarith [h_bound]

simp only [ge_iff_le, neg_mul, neg_add_rev, neg_neg, ← sub_eq_add_neg]
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
  have hsum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (Multiset.map (fun m => ↑(m.factorization p)) P.initial.a).sum := 
    Multiset.sum_nonneg fun x hx => by
      simp only [Multiset.mem_map] at hx
      obtain ⟨m, _, rfl⟩ := hx
      exact Nat.cast_nonneg _
  have hbound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ 
      P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    have hlog_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
      exact_mod_cast Nat.factorization_le P.n.factorial p
    linarith [mul_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg P.M) (Real.log_nonneg (by positivity : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n)),
              mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg P.M) (sq_nonneg (P.L : ℝ))) (Nat.cast_nonneg (primeCounting P.n))]
  linarith

have h1 : -(P.M : ℤ) * (Real.log P.n) - P.M * P.L^2 * (primeCounting P.n) ≤ 0 := by
    have hM : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.M := Nat.cast_nonneg _
    have hL : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.L^2 := sq_nonneg _
    have hpi : (0 : ℝ) ≤ primeCounting P.n := Nat.cast_nonneg _
    nlinarith [Real.log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast Nat.one_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le 
      (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le) : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n)]
  have h2 : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≥ 0 := by
    apply Multiset.sum_nonneg
    intro x hx
    exact Nat.zero_le _
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
  have hfact_nonneg : 0 ≤ (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) := Int.ofNat_nonneg _
  linarith [h1, h2, hfact_nonneg]

simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Params.initial]
  have h_sum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)
      (filter (fun m ↦ m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)
      (replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).join)).sum :=
    Multiset.sum_nonneg fun x hx ↦ by simp only [mem_map] at hx; obtain ⟨_, _, rfl⟩ := hx; positivity
  have h_fact_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
      · have h_legendre : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n / (p - 1) := by
          have hp_ge_2 : p ≥ 2 := hp_prime.two_le
          have := Nat.factorization_factorial_le_of_prime hp_prime P.n
          omega
        have h_p_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := Nat.cast_pos.mpr hp_prime.pos
        have h_L_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.L := Nat.cast_pos.mpr P.hL_pos
        have h_n_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
        calc (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ)
          _ ≤ P.n / (p - 1) := h_legendre
          _ ≤ P.n := Int.ofNat_le.mpr (Nat.div_le_self _ _)
          _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
              push_cast
              have := Real.add_one_le_exp (Real.log P.n)
              nlinarith [Real.exp_log h_n_pos, Nat.cast_nonneg (primeCounting P.n),
                Nat.cast_nonneg P.M, Nat.cast_nonneg P.L, sq_nonneg (P.L : ℝ)]
      · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]; positivity
  linarith

have h_sum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum :=
    Multiset.sum_nonneg fun x hx => by simp only [Multiset.mem_map] at hx; obtain ⟨_, _, rfl⟩ := hx; exact Nat.zero_le _
  have h_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · have hn_pos : 0 < P.n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn
      have h_legendre : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n := by
        by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
        · exact Int.ofNat_le.mpr (Nat.factorization_factorial_le hp_prime P.n)
        · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]
      calc (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ)
        _ ≤ P.n := h_legendre
        _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
            have hL_sq_lt : P.L * P.L < P.n := P.hL
            have : (P.n : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n + P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
              nlinarith [Real.log_pos (by norm_cast; linarith : (1 : ℝ) < P.n),
                Nat.cast_nonneg (primeCounting P.n), Nat.cast_nonneg P.M,
                Nat.cast_nonneg (P.L^2)]
            linarith
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
  linarith
sorry

have h1 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.M := Nat.cast_nonneg _
  have h2 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.L ^ 2 := sq_nonneg _
  have h3 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ primeCounting P.n := Nat.cast_nonneg _
  have h4 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · exact Real.log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn)
  simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Params.initial]
  have hsum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)
      (filter (fun m ↦ m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)
      (replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).join)).sum :=
    Multiset.sum_nonneg fun x hx ↦ by simp_all
  linarith [Nat.cast_nonneg (P.n.factorial.factorization p)]
